meta.description: Postgres Tool node for AI Agent - allows agent to search customer reviews with full-text search
meta.usage: Connect to AI Agent node - agent will write SQL dynamically to analyze reviews and sentiment

parameters.toolDescription:
Use this tool to search and analyze customer reviews. Supports full-text search for finding reviews mentioning specific keywords or themes.

Table schema:
- business_id (INT) - Foreign key to businesses table
- reviewer_name (TEXT) - Name of reviewer
- stars (INT) - Rating given (1-5)
- review_text (TEXT) - Full review content (full-text searchable)
- published_at (DATE) - When review was posted
- review_data (JSONB) - Complete review object

Common query patterns:

Find reviews mentioning keyword (full-text search):
SELECT b.business_name, r.review_text, r.stars FROM business_reviews r JOIN businesses b ON b.id = r.business_id WHERE to_tsvector('english', r.review_text) @@ to_tsquery('parking & problem') ORDER BY r.stars LIMIT 20;

Find negative reviews for specific business:
SELECT reviewer_name, stars, review_text, published_at FROM business_reviews WHERE business_id = (SELECT id FROM businesses WHERE business_name ILIKE '%business name%') AND stars <= 2 ORDER BY published_at DESC;

Review sentiment analysis by category:
SELECT b.category, AVG(r.stars) as avg_stars, COUNT(r.id) as review_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN r.stars <= 2 THEN 1 END) as negative_reviews FROM business_reviews r JOIN businesses b ON b.id = r.business_id WHERE b.city = 'Phoenix' GROUP BY b.category ORDER BY negative_reviews DESC;

Find common complaint themes:
SELECT b.business_name, COUNT(*) as complaint_count, string_agg(r.review_text, ' | ') as sample_complaints FROM business_reviews r JOIN businesses b ON b.id = r.business_id WHERE r.stars <= 2 AND r.review_text ILIKE '%your keyword%' GROUP BY b.business_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 3;

Full-text search operators:
- & = AND (both words must appear)
- | = OR (either word)
- ! = NOT (exclude word)
- <-> = words must be adjacent

Example: to_tsquery('coffee & (bad | terrible) & !service') finds reviews with "coffee" AND ("bad" OR "terrible") but NOT "service"

ALWAYS join with businesses table to get business_name for context. Limit results to 20-50 for readability.

notes.toolDescription: This description teaches the AI about full-text search operators and review sentiment analysis patterns
notes.fromAI: $fromAI('sql_query') extracts the SQL the agent generates from its reasoning
notes.safety: The agent can only SELECT - it cannot DROP tables or modify data (read-only queries)
notes.usage: Use for analyzing customer sentiment, finding review patterns, and identifying recurring themes
